---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Writing on exercise science, causal inference, and statistics."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, reading-time, title, description]
  date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---
